## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between GrowthX and SmartPass/Raptor Technologies, focusing on GrowthX's AI-driven content creation services.](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Jen's current company (Raptor) is slow to adopt new tech, limiting immediate relevance, but she's personally interested for future roles](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end content strategy and creation, leveraging AI and expert oversight (60+ clients, $10M+ revenue in 1 year)](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Pricing: $20-40K for 8-week strategy sprint, then $12K+/month for growth execution (10 articles/week, custom work available)](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)

## Topics

### Jen's Current Situation and Interest

  - [Q3 is peak season (60% of revenue) due to back-to-school in ed tech](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Transitioning from SmartPass (Chief Growth Officer) to Raptor Technologies](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Raptor is slow to adopt new tech (e.g., AI use blocked by CISO)](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [Personal interest in GrowthX for future roles, less immediate relevance for Raptor](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)

### GrowthX Services Overview

  - [End-to-end partner for content strategy and creation](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Expert team: managing editor, director, content manager per client](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Rapid growth: 60+ clients, $10M+ revenue in first year](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [AI-driven workflows to automate time-intensive parts of content creation](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Handles workload, allowing clients to avoid building large in-house teams](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)

### Content Creation Process and Examples

  - [Context engineering: 8-week strategy sprint to create persona docs, company context](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [12-month growth execution phase follows strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Diverse clients: Hound (accounting), Fathom, Tag1, Adventures Group](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Content types: blog posts, microsites (e.g., Augment Code), vendor catalogs (Ramp)](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Detailed workflow example: "13 best coding AIs for complex code bases" article](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Multi-step process: brief creation, research, outline, fact-checking, cross-linking, SEO](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)

### Pricing Model

  - [Strategy sprint: $20-40K (8 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Growth execution: Starts at $12K/month](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Standard package: 10 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Custom work available at higher price points](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to send follow-up email with overview and additional details](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [Jen to review and respond with any questions](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [Potential future discussion when Jen's situation aligns more closely with GrowthX services](https://fathom.video/share/yNeErAP48rFvWWrzN5hSC7L-vPWWWN87?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
